channel.title: Artio-dactyl on Vishvas's notes
channel.description: Recent content in Artio-dactyl on Vishvas's notes

item.title: Deer
item.description: Chital spotted deer, Axis axis, कृष्णसारः gives out bellows and alarm barks. अतः कदाचिद् रौतीति रुरुः। barasingha Rucervus duvaucelii, Swamp deer bellows during rut twelve-horned white spots along the spine Black buck Antilope cervicapra, कृष्णः Males have blackish skin. sambAr Large, plain coat. ऋष्यः whitefooted antelope Indian Muntjac Barking Deer / Indian Muntjac (Muntiacus muntjak)
